creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Sorry I can not reproduce your problem. 
licq-console does start here. 

Beware that you have to use the same gcc for licq-base 
and plugins. 

Possible Caveats: 
Du you have an 5.X binary of licq-base? 
Was licq oder the plugin build with a new gcc installed? 
Check date of your lciq, (Rebuild it?) 
Be sure you use same gcc versions for both. 

Setings in /etc/make.conf may caused your problem.
